name: Thai Spinach Beef Salad
intro: This is a fun salad to eat. It is crunchy, dense, and a little spicy. Most importantly, it's good for you.
method: To make the sauce, combine the lime juice, brown sugar, soy sauce, basil, mint, and gingerroot until combined.
Heat a large non-stick skillet coated with cooking spray over medium-high heat. Stir-fry the beef and jalapeños for 1-3 minutes.
Stir-fry the garlic for 1 minute. Turn off the heat when done.
Add spinach, red pepper, cucumber, beef mixture (Step 3) to a large bowl. Drizzle the sauce (Step 1) over it and mix well. Serve immediately.
